# Data Model Checklist: Enter Latitude/Longitude to Estimate Property Value

**Purpose**: Validate data model requirements completeness and alignment with the feature spec.
**Created**: 2026-03-10
**Feature**: `/home/ayra/ECE_493/Capstone-Test-Repo/specs/002-uc02-feature-spec/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all data items listed in the spec explicitly defined with fields and types? [Completeness, Spec §Data Involved]
- [x] CHK002 Are fields defined for coordinate precision (5 decimal places) and range validation? [Completeness, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK003 Are boundary validation results represented without estimate data when out of bounds? [Completeness, Spec §Exception / Error Flows]
- [x] CHK004 Are fields defined for parcel snapping and centroid selection? [Completeness, Spec §Clarifications]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK005 Is the canonical location ID definition clear enough to guarantee stability across identical inputs? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]
- [x] CHK006 Are constraints for estimate values (numeric, non-negative, low ≤ estimate ≤ high) stated in a way that can be modeled and validated? [Clarity, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK007 Do acceptance scenarios and functional requirements agree on the presence of estimate range and missing-data warnings? [Consistency, Spec §Acceptance Scenarios, Spec §Functional Requirements]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK008 Are data representations defined for partial-data estimates and missing-data warnings? [Coverage, Spec §Alternate Flows]
